final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale e-commerce campaign.

Style/medium: bold e-commerce promotional poster, flat vector with rich color blocking, inspired by Tmall/JD.com 618 grand sale visual language
Composition: vertical layout, hero headline centered at top third, product visual anchored in mid-section, CTA badge at bottom, generous padding on all sides
Subject: 绿联私有云 NAS/private cloud device as hero product, surrounded by celebratory 618 graphic elements — bursting ribbons, star sparks, discount badge
Scene/backdrop: deep gradient background transitioning from dark teal to vivid green, evoking brand identity and festive energy
Lighting/mood: bright, high-energy, celebratory; soft radial glow behind product to create depth
Color palette: 绿联 signature green as dominant, gold/yellow as accent for 618 numerals and price callouts, white for body text contrast
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云" "618" "周年庆"
Constraints: text hierarchy must be legible at thumbnail size (600×800 px preview); 618 numeral must be the largest typographic element; brand name 绿联私有云 must appear prominently
Avoid: generic stock-photo backgrounds, cluttered overlapping text, neon cyberpunk palette, dark moody lighting, watermarks
